states.name: Thor
states.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
states.description: Thor was the mightiest among the gods in existence, surpassed only by Odin, the Supreme God. However, she killed humans on a whim and slaughtered even her fellow gods. Because of her brutality, she was condemned as the Worst God and sealed away as a great sinner in the deepest depths of the world.

states.name: Thor
states.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
states.description: The true reason the giants were imprisoned in the Abyss was to serve as scapegoats, should the Worst God ever break free of her seal. The giants had no knowledge of Thor's existence, yet they felt it. Laughter mingled with the silence of the night and there was the unbearably cold scent of death.

states.name: Thor
states.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
states.description: She did feel emotions akin to affection and respect toward certain others. However, her way of expressing love was to destroy and before long no one remained by her side. She was lonely—yet she never knew what that meant.
